name: Chicken Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chicken pieces and cook until golden brown on all sides.
2. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside. Reduce the heat to low.
3. In the same skillet, add the sliced mushrooms and sauté until they start to soften.
4. Add the chopped garlic, quartered onions, sliced green peppers, sage leaves, and rosemary to the skillet. Stir to combine.
5. Cook the vegetables for a few minutes until they begin to soften.
6. Return the chicken to the skillet. Season with salt and ground pepper.
7. Pour in the white wine and stir to ensure all ingredients are well combined.
8. Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook on low heat for about 25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and the sauce has reduced slightly.
9. If the liquid begins to evaporate before the dish is fully cooked, add chicken broth as needed to maintain the desired consistency.
